word.item: come, I want to see you
No, I want to see you.
he scratches his leg to make the bad blood come out so that he will be able to run fast
she turned me down, she refused me
the wind is blowing, waving; it's windy
medicinal root, purifies blood, boiled and mixed with whisky
I put something around my head, body
I let the blood run (this was done on the legs to make a good runner)
something you wear on your head (like a ribbon tied around the head)
I tied a handkerchief around my head
I tied a handkerchief around my head
I tied it around my head
I'm laying down in the middle
Pumpkin Dance (used to have that kind)
it's too heavy, I can't lift it
I tote something on my back
I take a sip of water
black bird with red on wing
I pour something in & fill it up
when I fish the fish bites
it has dried up (like bayou, ocean)
the cloth I washed got dry
it slips out of (my hands) and falls
I'm going to twist (wring) the chicken's neck
I mash something, walking on it
I mash something, walking on it
the snake coils around a tree
I am in the process of learning
I wear a handkerchief on my head
I put it in a stooped position
I teach him something; I show him something
I show him before a mirror
I take a mirror and show him
I sit having it stooped down; humped over?
I live (go) together with him; I associate with him
I put it out (up) straight (like hanging curtains), spread out (on floor)
it bursts (like a boil, balloon, etc.)
I dress in a decorated manner
the deer lies stretched out dead
I shot and killed a squirrel
I shot and killed a squirrel
I pay my debt to him
he raises his arm to throw something
he throws it over his shoulder
he throws it over his shoulder
he sneaks up on it; he approaches it
he sneaks up on a duck
I draw (hide), (e.g. hide in tanning process)
squash bug (must be that says S.)
it's cloudy and is going to rain
some kind of root (something like cabbage) extinct now; leaves stay green all winter
I put the bread to rise
it's going to be that way
bark used for making black dye, plane tree (la plän); green chestnut hulls mixed with plane-tree bark
la liane noise (has pad de chat (cat grapes))
poison sumac (grows in the swamp); (something points)
extinct now (coulee de gris, Bayou named from these birds; don't come any more)
marrying her he took her and went
crow black woodpecker (Creole pique bois noire)
when you boil water it steams
he looks like someone else/he favors someone
I separate and place the cotton
clean, dust, separate, fluff cotton (for making quilt)
I'm used to it, like the place
the hail is raining, it's hailing
I stir up the fire, I poke the fire
hawk species (eat snakes, pointed wings, white and dark-colored, gray)
dove or pigeon species (bigger than pigeon, gray yellow in color)
in story about 'a´hpasala´mihta VI 33 p. 176 of text
she looks better, she is very beautiful
when they split and split it (fire) again
they were playing all the time
he was running all the time
she was singing all the time
she was single all the time
they were fussing all the time
I see two deer and three rabbits
How long you stay before you come?
warrior-counselor, worm that lives in rotten tree
warrior-counselor, worm that lives in rotten tree
you learn how to speak French?
I see a rabbit, a bear, and some children
I see a rabbit, a bear, and a turtle
maybe his wife or not is no telling, is unknown
(I guess he was inviting them to eat)
Where they stayed it still looks like that
